mapper.select: SELECT id, interface_id, config_name, url, http_method, timeout_ms, auth_type, auth_value, api_key_header, token_url, client_id, client_secret, token_scope, content_type, request_headers, request_template, success_http_codes, response_path, ssl_verify, proxy_host, proxy_port, proxy_user, proxy_password, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_rest_config WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, interface_id, config_name, url, http_method, timeout_ms, auth_type, auth_value, api_key_header, token_url, client_id, client_secret, token_scope, content_type, request_headers, request_template, success_http_codes, response_path, ssl_verify, proxy_host, proxy_port, proxy_user, proxy_password, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM eai_rest_config WHERE interface_id = #{interfaceId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eai_rest_config (interface_id, config_name, url, http_method, timeout_ms, auth_type, auth_value, api_key_header, token_url, client_id, client_secret, token_scope, content_type, request_headers, request_template, success_http_codes, response_path, ssl_verify, proxy_host, proxy_port, proxy_user, proxy_password, is_active) VALUES (#{interfaceId}, #{configName}, #{url}, #{httpMethod}, #{timeoutMs}, #{authType}, #{authValue}, #{apiKeyHeader}, #{tokenUrl}, #{clientId}, #{clientSecret}, #{tokenScope}, #{contentType}, #{requestHeaders}, #{requestTemplate}, #{successHttpCodes}, #{responsePath}, #{sslVerify}, #{proxyHost}, #{proxyPort}, #{proxyUser}, #{proxyPassword}, #{isActive})
mapper.update:
UPDATE eai_rest_config
interface_id = #{interfaceId}, config_name = #{configName}, url = #{url}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, timeout_ms = #{timeoutMs}, auth_type = #{authType},
auth_value = #{authValue},
api_key_header = #{apiKeyHeader}, token_url = #{tokenUrl}, client_id = #{clientId},
client_secret = #{clientSecret},
token_scope = #{tokenScope}, content_type = #{contentType}, request_headers = #{requestHeaders}, request_template = #{requestTemplate}, success_http_codes = #{successHttpCodes}, response_path = #{responsePath}, ssl_verify = #{sslVerify}, proxy_host = #{proxyHost}, proxy_port = #{proxyPort}, proxy_user = #{proxyUser},
proxy_password = #{proxyPassword},
is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
